description: Convert match scores to likelihoods using hierarchical Bayesian model; reference QC

functions.name: fetch_reference_sequences
functions.description: Search NCBI by taxon + barcode marker -> reference_df with taxonomy

inputs.name: priority_taxa
inputs.description: Species names from match data to prioritize (fully represented even when subsampling)

inputs.name: max_sequences
inputs.description: Total sequence download budget; subsamples proportionally if exceeded

inputs.name: min_per_taxon
inputs.description: Minimum sequences per taxon when subsampling

output.description: Data frame with accession, sequence, taxonomy

functions.scaling_note: NCBI API limited; ~5-30 min depending on taxon count and rate limits

functions.name: read_reference_fasta
functions.description: Read local FASTA + taxonomy -> reference_df. Supply either a data frame (taxonomy) or a 2-column TSV file (taxonomy_file, QIIME2/SILVA/MIDORI2 prefix or positional format)

inputs.name: taxonomy
inputs.description: Taxonomy data frame with accession column (mutually exclusive with taxonomy_file)

inputs.name: taxonomy_file
inputs.description: Path to 2-column taxonomy TSV (ID + semicolon-delimited ranks); QIIME2/RESCRIPt/SILVA/MIDORI2 prefix-style or positional (mutually exclusive with taxonomy)

inputs.name: rank_system
inputs.description: Taxonomy ranks to retain (auto-detected when NULL)

functions.name: read_crabs_output
functions.description: Read CRABS internal-format database (headerless 11-column TSV) -> reference_df. Complements flag_reference_errors(): CRABS handles bulk QC, TaxaLikely catches mislabeling

inputs.name: rank_system
inputs.description: Taxonomy ranks to retain (NULL = auto-detect from populated columns)

inputs.name: max_n_bases
inputs.description: Drop sequences longer than N bases

inputs.name: require_species
inputs.description: Drop rows without valid binomial species name (rejects sp., cf., uncultured)

inputs.name: dereplicate
inputs.description: Collapse exact-duplicate sequences within the same species

output.description: Reference data frame with accession, sequence, taxonomy columns

functions.name: build_site_reference
functions.description: High-level site-specific DNA reference builder (recommended). taxa list -> NCBI fetch -> optional mislabel flagging -> barcode coverage audit -> FASTA export. DNA/eDNA only

inputs.name: taxa
inputs.description: Taxon names (from TaxaExpect species list or user-supplied)

inputs.name: max_date
inputs.description: Restrict to sequences available by this date (YYYY/MM/DD)

inputs.name: ncbi_api_key
inputs.description: NCBI API key for higher rate limits

inputs.name: audit_coverage
inputs.description: Run audit_barcode_coverage() to identify unreferenced species

functions.scaling_note: NCBI API limited; ~5-30 min depending on taxon count

functions.name: fetch_reference_recordings
functions.description: Fetch bird sound recordings from Xeno-canto API v3 for acoustic reference model training. Acoustic analog of fetch_reference_sequences()

inputs.name: quality
inputs.description: Xeno-canto quality grades to accept (A=best, E=worst)

inputs.name: download_dir
inputs.description: Directory to save downloaded audio files

inputs.name: api_key
inputs.description: Xeno-canto API key (reads XC_API_KEY env var by default)

output.description: Recording metadata with species, quality, type, local_path, file_url columns

functions.scaling_note: Xeno-canto API; ~1-5 min for typical species lists

functions.name: build_acoustic_reference
functions.description: Acoustic analog of build_sequence_matrix(). Joins BirdNET-Analyzer detections to Xeno-canto ground-truth labels; labels H1/H2/H3. Train one model per recording type (song, call)

inputs.name: exclude_background
inputs.description: Drop detections of species listed in also_species (background species)

output.description: Pair-format data frame (.x/.y suffixes, p_match, coverage, testid) for train_likelihood_model()

functions.name: build_image_reference
functions.description: Image analog of build_acoustic_reference(). Joins image classifier detections to user-supplied ground-truth image labels; labels H1/H2/H3. Train one model per testid (classifier/camera type)

inputs.name: image_df
inputs.description: Image classifier output from read_animl_output(), read_inaturalist_cv_output(), or read_wildlife_insights_output()

inputs.name: images_meta
inputs.description: Ground-truth labels: requires image_path + taxonomy rank columns. Optional: testid (classifier/camera type), quality (0-1)

output.description: Pair-format data frame (.x/.y suffixes, p_match, coverage, testid) for train_likelihood_model()

functions.name: audit_acoustic_coverage
functions.description: Acoustic/image analog of audit_barcode_coverage(). Which plausible species are absent from the classifier's known species list? Simple set-membership check — no NCBI API calls

inputs.name: taxa
inputs.description: Plausible species names (from TaxaExpect or LLM suggest)

inputs.name: classifier_species
inputs.description: Species names known to the classifier (e.g., BirdNET's built-in list)

inputs.name: match_df
inputs.description: Optional: annotates census with in_match_data column

output.description: List with $census (data frame) and $unreferenced (character vector of species absent from classifier)

functions.name: calibrate_coverage_filter
functions.description: Sweep coverage thresholds over reference pairs; return H1/H2 discrimination metrics. Youden's J (youden_j) identifies the Pareto-optimal threshold

inputs.name: thresholds
inputs.description: Coverage thresholds to test (default seq(0, 0.99, by=0.05))

output.description: Per-threshold metrics: threshold, breadth, h1_retention, h2_retention, youden_j, discrimination

functions.scaling_note: Fast; sweeps thresholds over existing data

functions.name: coverage_threshold
functions.description: Quantile shortcut for coverage filtering: keep_frac=0.95 returns threshold at 5th percentile of coverage distribution

inputs.name: keep_frac
inputs.description: Fraction of pairs to retain (0-1); higher = more lenient

output.description: Coverage threshold value; use as: raw_df[raw_df$coverage >= threshold, ]

functions.name: write_reference_fasta
functions.description: Export reference_df to FASTA + optional companion taxonomy TSV. TSV is positional format compatible with read_reference_fasta(taxonomy_file=)

inputs.name: rank_system
inputs.description: Taxonomy ranks (auto-detected from non-id columns if NULL)

output.description: Returns reference_df invisibly; side effect is writing files to disk

functions.name: build_sequence_matrix
functions.description: Align sequences and compute pairwise distance matrix
functions.scaling_note: Pairwise alignment: O(n^2). ~5 min for 500 sequences, ~20 min for 2000

functions.name: flag_reference_errors
functions.description: Flag mislabeled reference sequences using trained model residuals

output.description: Error list with accession, error_type, score

functions.name: train_likelihood_model
functions.description: Train hierarchical likelihood model from reference matrix

output.description: Trained model object with H1/H2/H3 parameters and reference_errors

functions.scaling_note: Fast after matrix is built; ~10 sec

functions.name: evaluate_likelihoods
functions.description: Apply trained model to match scores -> likelihoods per hypothesis

functions.name: filter_top_hypotheses
functions.description: Keep finest-rank candidates per query; drop coarser duplicates

functions.name: remove_flagged_references
functions.description: Remove mislabeled accessions from match_df using flag_reference_errors() output

functions.name: interpret_model
functions.description: Summarize trained model: species count, diagnostics, per-species profiles
